name: Vivek Tomar
text:
Kuta Beach, Bali
Kuta Beach is one of Bali’s most famous and vibrant coastal destinations, located on the island’s southwestern coast, just minutes away from Ngurah Rai International Airport. Known for its long stretch of golden sand and powerful surf, Kuta has evolved from a quiet fishing village into a lively hub of tourism, offering something for every kind of traveler.
The beach is especially popular among surfers, beginners, and sun-seekers. Gentle to moderate waves make it an ideal spot for surf lessons, and several surf schools line the beachfront. Visitors can also enjoy beach walks, volleyball, or simply relax on the sand while watching a breathtaking Balinese sunset — one of the most beautiful in Indonesia.
Kuta Beach is surrounded by a wide range of restaurants, beach bars, and cafes serving both local Indonesian delicacies and international cuisine. The area also offers vibrant nightlife, with numerous pubs, clubs, and live music venues that come alive after sunset. For those who love shopping, Beachwalk Shopping Center and the local art markets nearby offer everything from souvenirs and handmade crafts to designer brands.
Despite its bustling atmosphere, Kuta retains its charm with friendly locals, street performers, and a laid-back tropical vibe. Lifeguards are stationed at key points, making it relatively safe for swimming, especially during calm tides.
Kuta is also well-connected to nearby attractions such as Legian, Seminyak, and the sacred Uluwatu Temple. Whether you’re a surfer chasing waves, a traveler looking to experience Bali’s energy, or a family seeking fun by the sea, Kuta Beach offers a perfect mix of adventure, relaxation, and culture.
Address: Kuta, Badung Regency, Bali, Indonesia
Best time to visit: April to October (dry season) for sunny weather and ideal surf conditions.

text: I wish I could rate this higher.  The water is murky and dirty, there is trash all along the beach (plastic, discarded food items and offerings, etc), and there is often very little room to sit and enjoy the sunset, plus almost all access forces you to navigate a gauntlet of folks trying to offer massages or surfing lessons. name: Stefan Radu
text:
My experience in Kuta, Bali – the worst place I’ve ever visited. Has anyone else felt the same?

I need to share this because I honestly regret ever stepping foot in Kuta. Coming from Ubud – which felt beautiful, calm, and full of amazing people – arriving in Kuta was like falling straight into hell.

Everyone I met there was trying to rip me off, scam me, or intimidate me. One Grab driver even tried to push drugs on me, and when I refused, he started nodding his head like a threat, as if to say “you’ll see, I’ll come back with more people.” That moment said everything about this place: shady, aggressive, and rotten. Another one came later pretending to be friendly, but it felt just as fake.

The streets are chaos. Motorbikes everywhere, pollution so heavy the air feels grey. Crossing the road feels like risking your life. Locals hand scooters to tourists with no licenses just for quick cash. The beaches? Dirty, crawling with rats and cockroaches. The nightlife? Drunk tourists fighting in the street, shady bars, and prostitutes trying to rob you. There’s no Balinese culture left here – just scams, trash, and noise.

Even the police are useless. They don’t protect anyone – they only look for tourists to squeeze money from. If you ever defend yourself here, you won’t get justice. You’ll just end up paying bribes to get out.

The only decent moments I had in Kuta were when I left it – to see Garuda Wisnu Kencana or a cleaner beach far away. Everything else was pure misery.

Kuta feels like a cancer on Bali. Overpriced, filthy, hostile, and soulless. Honestly, I think it’s the worst travel destination I’ve ever seen.

name: Mr Ridan
text:
Kuta Beach – My Honest Experience
I first visited Kuta Beach at the end of 2022 during New Year’s Eve, and honestly it hasn’t changed much since then.

The beach is long, sandy, and lively – great for beginners learning to surf, catching the sunset, or just enjoying the busy vibe. It’s also very close to the airport and surrounded by restaurants, shops, and nightlife, so you’ll never get bored.

But keep in mind: it’s often crowded, noisy, and not the cleanest beach in Bali. Sometimes you’ll see plastic waste in the water or sand, and street vendors can be a bit pushy. Traffic around the area is also hectic.

Overall, I’d say Kuta Beach is worth a visit if you like energy, nightlife, and people-watching 🌅, but if you want peace and clean water, there are quieter beaches in Bali.

name: yi Xiong
text:
漫步在库塔美丽阳光沙滩，吹着海风，一阵阵海潮涨起潮落，望向大海，愿所有人如大海一样心胸开阔无边……晚上的美景衬托下的大街小巷，更是充满异国情调。
库塔离飞机场走路20分钟不到就到了街上，到库塔海滩不到30分钟，我们看海景主要是从视觉、地理位置等角度欣赏，比如在海边沙滩、栈道、悬崖等不同地点，从不同视角感受海的辽阔和美丽，用心体会感受就不一样，巴厘岛岛南端，是巴厘岛最热闹的沙滩，以冲浪和夜生活闻名。这里的海滩平坦，海浪较大，是玩冲浪和滑板的乐园，沙滩到处都是冲浪板出租和冲浪教练。巴厘岛的机场也位于库塔。库塔海滩 (Kuta Beach)离国际机场约15分钟车程，走路20多分钟，是离巴厘岛机场最近的一个海滩，也是在巴厘岛游客集聚最多的热闹地区，就像集市一般，形成了一道独特靓丽的风景，这里的星级酒店，度假村，各式各样的餐饮文化，酒吧娱乐，按摩.纹身店都提供给游客，当我行走在大街小巷穿行，从不同地方到达海边，吹着海风，看着潮起潮涌的海水，感受到大自然的馈赠，无比的开阔视野，大海是无比的宽广美丽。
这是我来到国际范著名的巴厘岛的一次访问，非常值得到访参观，希望以后我会再次来到巴厘岛，了解这里更多人文历史和休闲放松。

name: Veronika Mihin
text:
Kuta Beach is a great spot for surfers – perfect for beginners as well as more experienced riders. The waves are ideal for learning, and there are plenty of surf schools and board rentals available. The atmosphere is relaxed, and the sunsets are truly stunning.

The only small downside is that locals often walk around offering services or items, which can be a bit distracting when you just want to relax. Still, they are very friendly and welcoming, so the overall experience remains very positive.

Overall rating: highly recommended, especially for surfing! 🌊🏄

name: N3Y
text:
Salah satu ikonik pulau Bali adalah pantai Kuta. Pantai yang sangat dekat sekali dengan jalan raya, mall, restaurant, cafe dan hotel. Pokoknya strategis banget tempatnya. Tapi yang namanya macet udah jadi ikonik juga di Bali. Palagi jalan menuju ke pantai Kuta kalau sore hari entah itu weeday apalagi weekend. Banyak penjual makanan dan minuman di sepanjang pantai ini, harganya masih dalam batas wajar. Melihat sunsetpun disini sangat cantik. Loss pemandangannya. Bisa untuk berenang di pantai ini. Parkiran luas di pinggir jalan dan berbayar. Baik parkir motor dan mobil. Pantainya bersih dengan hamparan pasir putihnya yang padat. Senja yang romantis disini.
Happy holiday🏊

name: JOKER'S
text:
Kuta Beach is a solid choice if you’re looking to try surfing for the first time. The waves are decent, not too strong, and perfect for beginners. Swimming is technically possible here, but you won’t really enjoy it — the place is packed with surfers, especially in the afternoon.

If you’ve never surfed before, I highly recommend taking a surfing lesson — it’s a lot of fun! But be smart:
💸 The usual price for a 2-hour lesson directly with an instructor is 150,000 IDR.
🏫 If you go through a surf school, expect to pay at least 250,000 IDR.
💡 Pro tip: Take one lesson through the school, then deal directly with the same instructor outside the school. That way, you pay less (even 100,000 IDR) and the instructor earns more — since schools usually only pay them 100k anyway. Just don’t mention this to the school. 😏

The beach itself is a bit dirty, and there are crowds everywhere, especially at sunset. But oh, those sunsets… 🌅 Absolutely stunning. I highly recommend grabbing a seat at one of the beach bars or little tables set up along the upper side of the beach.
❗️Important tip: Don’t pay for a table — the legit ones are free as long as you order drinks. If someone asks you to pay for the table itself, just walk away.

💰 Prices are fairly reasonable:
•	Local beer (330ml can): ~30,000 IDR
•	Fresh coconut: ~40,000 IDR

So overall, Kuta is worth visiting, especially for surfing and sunsets, but don’t expect a peaceful beach day or crystal-clear water.

name: reem bawazeer
text:
Kuta Beach is a must-visit if you’re in Bali, especially for the sunset — it’s absolutely breathtaking. The sky lights up with deep oranges and pinks, creating a picture-perfect view that’s hard to forget. The beach itself has a lively, energetic atmosphere with plenty of locals and tourists enjoying the waves and vibe.

However, I wasn’t impressed with the food options nearby. Many of the beachside stalls and restaurants felt a bit overpriced for the quality, and the flavors didn’t quite live up to expectations. That said, the overall ambiance — the sound of the waves, music in the background, and people just relaxing — makes it well worth a visit.

If you go, go for the sunset and the vibe. Maybe eat elsewhere first.

name: Amit K Das
text:
Kuta Beach is a 2.5-km stretch of cream-coloured sand, bordering Legian to the north and Tuban (home of the Ngurah Rai International Airport) to the south.

Kuta is well known in Bali for being a cheap tourist destination for Australians due to its close proximity. Kuta Beach is popular among surfers.

This beach is very close to the international airport. Nice in the evening to watch sunset.
There are cafes and bar along the beach where you can enjoy your evening.

Kuta Beach, located on the southwestern coast of Bali, is one of the island’s most renowned destinations. Known for its long stretch of golden sand and consistent surf, it attracts both local and international tourists year-round. The beach is particularly popular among beginner surfers due to its manageable waves and ample surf schools.

Sunsets at Kuta Beach are breathtaking, with vibrant colors painting the sky each evening. The area also offers a variety of restaurants, cafes, and shopping options, making it a convenient and lively hub for tourists. However, it tends to be quite crowded, especially during peak season, and cleanliness can sometimes be an issue due to the high footfall.

Overall, Kuta Beach is ideal for travelers seeking a blend of natural beauty and vibrant nightlife, though those looking for serenity may prefer the more secluded beaches in Bali.

name: Elena Mirnaya
text: Красивый берег. Отличная тренировочная база для начинающих и продолжающих серфингистов любого возраста. Для людей мечтающих поучаствовать-прекрасное Береговая линия для прогулок и пробежек. Множество местных жителей предлагают лежаки зонтики и другие приспособления для пляжного отдыха. Некоторые пытаются плавать. Хотя в основном в настоящий момент по всему берегу стоят красные флаги, где написано что плавание запрещено. Очень хорошо наблюдать за приливами отливами. Индийский океан поражает своей красотой в любое время суток.

name: Alexandra Man
text:
1 star is too much.

I visited this beach one evening because I wanted to do some shopping in the mall nearby before I leave Bali. 🤯🤯 it ruined my day honestly.

I am lucky I had to spend only 2 hours roaming on the main street and on the beach, and I cannot imagine how is to book a hotel in the neighbourhood and having to visit this beach every day.

The beach is a nightmare, full of garbage, and the little beach shops were closed at this moment. I saw a huge rat at one point!

The street, very loud, traffic, bars, restaurants, shops, locals trying to sell you stuff ( at least there is a pedestrian area compared to other streets).
The aesthetics of this place was unbearable

name: Calobur Obby
text:
Disrespectful and scammy experience

Kuta Beach was a huge disappointment. As soon as I arrived, I was constantly approached by people offering to sell weed — even Uber drivers. When I told them it was illegal, they insisted it was “legal now,” clearly trying to scam tourists. It feels unsafe and dishonest.

At the beach, someone offered me food. I accepted but declined to buy a drink. As soon as I paid for the food, the man turned cold and told me I wasn’t allowed to sit at the tables unless I bought a drink — even though the place was half-empty and I had just explained I was on a low budget. He made me sit at the back near a shack, with no ocean view. After I finished eating and stood up to go swim, he told me to leave because “other clients were coming.” No one else was there — he was just still upset I didn’t buy a drink.

If you have money, they’ll act nice. If you don’t, they treat you like garbage. It’s not about kindness — it’s about what they can take from you. Avoid this beach if you want to be treated with basic respect.

Sekarang enak banget akses pantainya kalo naik motor. Parkir di pinggir jalan, jalan sebentar dan sudah bisa menikmati Pantai Kuta. Pasir pantainya ga putih sih, tapi tetap saja menyenangkan. Airnya dingin, anginnya juga.
Jalan menyusuri bibir pantai sembari dengerin Kuta Bali-nya Andre Hehanussa (keliatan generasi apa, wkwk) bisa bikin healing sendiri. Sekilas lihat kalo mau ke toilet harus ke convenient store dulu ya? Ga terlihat tanda toilet umum selama di sana sih.
See you again, Kuta!

name: April Hong
text:
Kuta Beach, located in Bali, is a well-known and popular beach known for its surfing, sunsets, and vibrant atmosphere. It stretches for 2.5 kilometers along the southwestern coast of Bali, bordering Legian to the north and Tuban to the south. The beach is a major tourist destination, offering a mix of natural beauty, activity, and amenities, including a variety of accommodations, restaurants, shops, and nightlife.

Pantai Kuta sampai saat ini masih menjadi salah satu destinasi yang wajib dikunjungi jika kalian datang ke Bali. Selain letaknya yang strategis , kalian bisa menikmati sunset yang indah (jika cuaca mendukung) dan masih banyak lagi aktivitas yang bisa kalian lakukan di pantai kuta.

Ja unsere Kuta Beach war mal so schön🤩mit Bäumen bis fast ans Wasser ab und an eine "Strandbar" wo du eine Kokosnuss oder ein kühles Blondes bekommen hast.
Heute ist die Beach verschandelt, die meissten Bäume gerodet🙈😡
Alle 2 Meter (kein Witz) ein Stand wo dir einer was andrehen will🙈einfach nur nervig.
Es gibt ein paar gemütliche Strandrestos mit Beanbaggs wo du Speiss und Trank bekommst, die Speissen von sehr gut bis grotten schlecht🤣🤗 wie überal😉

Sie geben sich zwar mühe den Strand zu reinigen aber oft ist er vermüllt weil die Localtouristen überall ihren Dreck hin schmeissen oder einfach liegen lassen.

In den Medien heisst es dann wieder es seien die bösen Bules. Die dafür verantwortlich sind.
Das Ding ist nur ich sehe sehr viele Bules die wie ich ihren Müll fachgerecht entsorgen.

Kuta Beach ist immer noch okayyy, aber nicht .ehr top..
Da gibt es schönere Beaches😁😉

The place felt a bit neglected, with a lot of plastic waste and garbage scattered around, it almost looked like a dumping area in parts. That said, there were still plenty of people enjoying the beach, relaxing with drinks and taking in the view.

The view itself is nice, but it can get very crowded depending on the time and spot. I’d recommend wearing footwear, as there are lots of small rubbles and debris that could hurt if you're walking barefoot.

Evenings seem to be the best time to visit. There are nearby stores selling fresh coconuts and alcoholic beverages, which adds to the laid back beach vibe.

name: sunny
text:
Kuta Beach in Bali, once a renowned destination for its surf and vibrant atmosphere, has unfortunately become a hotspot for pollution and poor waste management. While the area boasts thousands of hotels and generates significant revenue from tourism, authorities have struggled to address the persistent issue of trash accumulation, the lack of sustainable waste management systems and public awareness remains evident

Tourists and vendors contribute to the issue by littering, with few bins or signs promoting recycling. The beach’s beauty is overshadowed by its polluted waters and littered sands, making it less appealing for those seeking beach holidays.

name: Otakar Klika
text:
Kuta Beach is a popular spot for watching sunsets, and I have to say, the view is stunning. You can even see the GWK statue in the distance, which adds a nice touch to the scenery. The waves are relatively small, making it an ideal place for beginner surfers. If you don’t have your own board, you can rent one pretty much anywhere along the beach.

However, aside from surfing and sunsets, the overall experience is disappointing. The beach is completely taken over by bars, chairs, and tables, leaving barely any space to just relax on the sand. Vendors are constantly approaching you, trying to get you to sit at their bar or buy something, which gets annoying really fast.

The worst part? The trash. The beach is covered in garbage, making it impossible to enjoy a proper beach day here. It’s a shame because Kuta Beach has the potential to be an amazing spot, but unless you’re here for surfing or catching the sunset, I wouldn’t recommend spending too much time here.

name: Abdou Zidane
text:
Jungle on the left, jungle on the right, myself in the middle, somewhere. With my hair flying in the wind, I was running on a scooter drove by a local on a dusty bumpy road. Banana trees with large leafs, some taking a bow and offering heavy green bananas, others, more proud, only red banana flowers, all were guarding the road. It was indescribably green. And wild and untamed. Every single time another scooter or car was passing by, magic was happening: we all became invisible in a thick cloud of dust. No one cared!

– Could you take me after to Manta Point? the scooter driver nod his head. Must have been the 5th time I was telling him this in the last 30 minutes, since we left the jetty.

Some dreams are old, other new. Mine was just two days ago born and was already taking me to a famous place, called Manta Point, where Andrew has told me the other days, in Mabul island in Malaysia, how he experienced something out of this world: swimming with the manta rays. September is a perfect time, he added. So there I was, dreaming eyes wide open that day, on another island: Nusa Penida.

Sehari hari banyak pedagang makanan, minuman dan jasa sewa papan surfing atau kelas belajar surfing, jasa massage dan penjual souvenir.
Disekitar Lokasi terdapat banyak hotel, penginapan dan juga mall yang merupakan salah satu tempat yang wajib di kunjungi di pantai Kuta ini.
Memiliki lahan parkir yang sepanjang jalan buat mobil ataupun motor.

수영은 커녕 비치가를 거닐수조차 없는곳입니다.

text: Beware of the many sellers who will try to sell their products or services to you. When I purchased a coconut and relaxed by the beach, three different sellers came to ask me to buy their goods or services. I declined them but one woman who very aggressive. Think twice before relaxing here. It is better to do it at your hotel pool.

name: Kurniawati Sjafei
text:
The beach is usually lively, with a vibrant atmosphere, especially during sunset, when people gather to enjoy the breathtaking view. The waves are ideal for surfing, attracting both beginners and experienced surfers.

Along the beach, you’ll find numerous shops, restaurants, and bars, making it convenient for visitors to grab a bite or shop for souvenirs. However, because of its popularity, the area can get crowded, especially during peak tourist seasons. Despite this, Kuta Beach remains a must-visit for its lively vibe, accessibility, and the stunning sunsets that make it worth the visit. It’s a great place to relax or enjoy water sports.

name: Heri Noto
text:
Berikut adalah contoh review untuk Pantai Kuta, Bali:

Review Pantai Kuta, Bali

Pantai Kuta adalah destinasi yang menawarkan pengalaman liburan yang menyenangkan, meskipun ada beberapa hal yang perlu diperhatikan. Saya mengunjungi pantai ini saat musim liburan, dan berikut adalah pengalaman saya:

Kelebihan:

1. Pemandangan Indah: Matahari terbenam di Pantai Kuta benar-benar memukau! Gradasi warna langit yang indah membuat momen ini terasa sangat spesial.

2. Aktivitas Seru: Banyak kegiatan yang bisa dilakukan, seperti berselancar, bermain voli pantai, atau sekadar duduk menikmati angin laut.

3. Akses Mudah: Lokasinya dekat dengan bandara dan banyak akomodasi di sekitarnya, mulai dari hotel mewah hingga penginapan budget.

4. Pilihan Kuliner Beragam: Restoran dan kafe di sekitar pantai menawarkan berbagai makanan lokal dan internasional.

Kesimpulan:
Pantai Kuta tetap menjadi destinasi wajib untuk siapa saja yang ingin merasakan atmosfer Bali yang hidup. Namun, jika Anda mencari pengalaman yang lebih tenang, mungkin bisa memilih waktu kunjungan yang lebih sepi atau menjelajahi pantai-pantai lain di Bali.

name: Johnny G
text: Kuta Beach in Bali is one of the most famous and vibrant beach destinations in the region. Located in the southern part of Bali, it's known for its soft golden sand, lively atmosphere, and iconic surf culture2. The beachfront is lined with cafes, restaurants, and shops, making it a bustling hub of activity. Kuta Beach is also a popular spot for watching stunning sunsets over the Indian Ocean, and it offers a variety of water sports and activities for visitors of all ages

name: M/s Super Hardware
text: With long stretches of white sand beach, gentle waves and epic sunsets, it's no wonder Kuta is one of the most popular beaches in Bali. The famous area offers an array of thrilling watersports, electric nightlife, vibrant markets, and some of the best hotels and resorts in Bali. Kuta has Kuta Beach, Pandawa Beach and Balangan Beach. Both area's beaches are actually very nice as you might expect from towns that were built as beach towns. However, the better beaches are probably those in Seminyak because they tend to be better maintained.Kuta is often hailed as the epicenter of nightlife in Bali, a place where the party atmosphere is palpable every night of the week.

However, when I visited in March, the beach was lovely, offering a much more enjoyable experience.

Не рекомендую до відвідування цей пляж. Якщо ви хочете реально красивих пейзажів і чистоти, краще одразу їдьте в Улувату. Там усе виглядає набагато краще – чисті пляжі, шикарні краєвиди і атмосфера зовсім інша.

А цей пляж – ну, таке. Скоріше для дідусів і бабусь, які просто хочуть посидіти біля води. Якщо ви шукаєте щось цікавіше та сучасніше – точно не сюди. Не витрачайте свій час.

如果不下雨，晚上來看會好很多，只是木頭廢棄物太多了。

name: Jakob & Sophia
text:
Two dead turtles. That’s the result of one random stroll of 30min on Kuta Beach today.
As I was walking past, the first dead turtle was just being hushed into a plastic bag so not too many people would see it. Only around 3min later there was just another one laying there washed up on the shore. Apparently it had just recently stranded as no measures had been taken yet to removed it. According to previous reviews these incidents seem to occur rather frequently.
The pollution and the amount of litter and plastic on this beach is truly saddening. Shop owners tried to tell me the turtles - being the ocean animals they are - must have died from big waves or maybe got hit by debris in the water. Despite living by and of the nearby ocean, the shops don’t seem to care about more than what’s happening in front of their counter. The tourist folks on the other hand rather don‘t care either since they are on their well deserved annual leave and more happy to get shit faced by overprized booze.
It’s heartbreaking to see wildlife deliberately damaged and animals threatened or killed.
Of course, sadly enough it‘s not that there are not similar things happening elsewhere in the world. But is this seriously the culmination of what human beings come to praise as a renowned, world class beach and tourist destination?

If you read this comment, please save yourself some decency and don’t support this by going there.

P.s.: Ironically, the Turtle Conservation Centre was situated just some 100m farther. It‘s permanently closed.

Belle plage mais moment de détente complètement gâché.
Nous avons été dérangés toutes les 5 minutes par des marchands locaux qui souhaitaient nous vendre des bracelets et broutilles du même genre.

Evidemment, je ne suis pas insensible aux difficultés auxquelles ces gens sont confrontés mais cette présence très intrusive vient clairement gâcher l’expérience.
Une dame s’est carrément permise de s’asseoir sur mon transat pour tenter de me vendre des bijoux , elle y est restée 10 minutes au moins.
Après avoir dit 20 fois non , j’ai fini par me taire et la laisser profiter de mon transat avec moi jusqu’à ce qu’elle se décide à partir.

name: Octavianus Pratama
text:
Pantai Kuta adalah salah satu ikon pariwisata Bali yang paling terkenal di dunia. Terletak di bagian selatan pulau Bali,pantai ini menawarkan keindahan alam yang memukau, suasana yang semarak, dan beragam aktivitas yang menarik.

Pantai Kuta memiliki pasir putih yang lembut dan luas, sangat cocok untuk bersantai, berjemur, atau bermain voli pantai. Pemandangan matahari terbenam di Pantai Kuta adalah salah satu yang paling indah di Bali. Siluet pohon kelapa dan ombak yang bergulung menjadi latar belakang yang sempurna untuk mengabadikan momen.

Secara keseluruhan, Pantai Kuta adalah destinasi wisata yang sangat lengkap dan cocok untuk semua kalangan. Keindahan alamnya yang memukau, suasana yang semarak, dan beragam aktivitas yang menarik membuat Pantai Kuta menjadi salah satu tempat favorit di Bali.

Disclaimer dan Saran untuk Pengunjung Pantai Kuta untuk ulasan saya tentang Pantai Kuta berdasarkan pengalaman pribadi saya. Perlu diingat bahwa pendapat setiap pengunjung bisa berbeda-beda.

Semoga informasi ini membantu!

name: Fadhil Amadan
text:
Kuta Beach is undoubtedly one of Bali’s most famous and popular destinations. The expansive stretch of golden sand, combined with the sound of crashing waves, creates a classic tropical beach experience. It’s a great place for those who love to surf, as the waves here are perfect for beginners and seasoned surfers alike. The beach’s lively atmosphere is enhanced by the presence of local vendors selling everything from refreshing coconut water to souvenirs.

During my visit, I found Kuta Beach to be a good spot to catch the sunset, which is absolutely stunning. As the sun dips below the horizon, the sky fills with shades of orange, pink, and purple, making it the ideal time for a relaxing walk along the shoreline. However, I did notice that it can get a bit crowded, especially during peak hours, so if you’re looking for a more tranquil experience, it might be better to visit early in the morning.

While Kuta Beach has a lot to offer, I would also mention that the area surrounding the beach is bustling with activity. There are plenty of restaurants, bars, and shops nearby, which is convenient if you want to grab a bite or do some shopping after spending time on the beach. The only downside is that the beach isn’t always the cleanest due to the large number of visitors, but the natural beauty of the place makes up for it.

Overall, Kuta Beach is a great spot if you’re looking for a vibrant and energetic beach experience. Whether you’re here to surf, people-watch, or simply relax, there’s something for everyone. Just be prepared for the crowds and make sure to catch the stunning sunset—it’s worth the visit!

It's a popular spot for tourists, offering a variety of beach bars and restaurants nearby. While it can get crowded, the vibrant energy makes it a great place to socialize and enjoy beach activities. Surf lessons are widely available, making it accessible for beginners. Overall, Kuta Beach is a lively hub that captures the essence of Bali's beach culture, ideal for those looking to soak up sun and fun.

name: Gangadhar Chatla
text: Kata Beach is a picturesque and tranquil destination known for its soft white sand and crystal-clear waters. The beach is surrounded by lush green hills and towering palm trees, creating a serene atmosphere. The calm and shallow waters make it an ideal spot for swimming, snorkeling, and kayaking, while the nearby coral reef offers a glimpse into the underwater world. As the sun sets, Kata Beach transforms into a romantic haven, with restaurants and bars offering stunning views.  Whether you're seeking relaxation, adventure, or simply a taste of tropical paradise, Kata Beach has something for everyone.

name: Agus Nurwahid
text:
Pantai Kuta di Bali adalah salah satu destinasi pantai paling ikonik di Indonesia yang terkenal di seluruh dunia. Terletak di sebelah selatan Bali, Pantai Kuta menawarkan kombinasi yang memikat antara keindahan alam, kehidupan malam yang bersemangat, dan suasana yang ramai.

Keindahan alam Pantai Kuta memukau dengan pasir putihnya yang luas dan ombak yang ideal bagi peselancar pemula hingga berpengalaman. Pantai ini sering kali menjadi tempat latihan bagi mereka yang ingin menguasai teknik berselancar. Pemandangan matahari terbenam di Pantai Kuta juga menarik banyak wisatawan yang ingin menikmati momen magis ketika matahari perlahan tenggelam di balik cakrawala Bali.

Pantai Kuta juga terkenal dengan kehidupan malamnya yang dinamis. Di sepanjang jalan utama yang mengelilingi pantai, terdapat berbagai macam bar, restoran, dan klub malam yang menawarkan berbagai hiburan mulai dari musik live, pertunjukan tari, hingga acara khusus. Ini menjadikan Kuta sebagai pusat kehidupan malam yang tidak pernah sepi di Bali.

Bagi para pelancong yang mencari pengalaman berbelanja, Kuta menawarkan berbagai macam butik, pasar tradisional, dan pusat perbelanjaan yang menjual berbagai barang dari pakaian, aksesori, hingga suvenir khas Bali. Pengunjung juga dapat menemukan berbagai jenis makanan dan minuman di sepanjang jalan ini, mulai dari makanan lokal hingga masakan internasional.

Meskipun sering kali dikunjungi oleh wisatawan internasional yang mencari kehidupan malam yang aktif dan pantai yang ramai, Pantai Kuta tetap menyajikan pesona alam yang menakjubkan dan menyenangkan untuk keluarga maupun individu. Ini adalah tempat yang sempurna untuk bersantai, menikmati kehidupan pantai, dan mengalami kebudayaan Bali yang unik.

name: E Z
text:
Kuta Beach in Bali offers a vibrant atmosphere perfect for people-watching and soaking up the sun. The sunsets here are incredible, and there are plenty of options to relax: find shade under a beach umbrella, grab a delicious and affordable drink or snack from friendly local vendors, or indulge in a relaxing massage right on the sand. It's a great spot for a casual stroll or a more adventurous activity like taking a surfing lesson.

While some areas back onto hotels and traffic can be chaotic, there's ample parking for scooters or taxis. The beach itself is quite lively, with vendors offering their wares every few meters.  While this can feel overwhelming to some, it's also part of the charm, and their prices are very reasonable.  Embrace the energy, support the locals by buying a souvenir or trying a massage, or simply grab a drink and watch the world go by. Kuta Beach might not be the most pristine beach in Bali, but it offers a unique and unforgettable experience.

name: Lau Hui Hann

text:
Good beach to visit especially at night and evenings
It is a really fun place to relax with friends and family, as you just need a big carpet, some food, juice and a music system, and then let the beach do its work!!
You will surely weave a lifetime memory, spending an evening on the beach with your loved ones, watching the sun set, having your drink and singing songs to your fullest.
Do not expect much thrill on the beach as the waves are only for namesake. But don't get disappointed as the water is crystal clear and the weather is also friendly for most part of the year.
It is not even much crowded and is spread along a long strip of land, so you can always find yourself a comfortable spot.

Visit di siang dan sore hari menjelang sunset karena gabut. Sepanjang jalan di pinggir pantainya ada banyak pedagang dan penjajal jasa. Mulai dari jual minuman, makanan, sewa surfboard, pakaian, kepang, pijit dll. Buat harganya.. little bit pricy menurut saya. Sekilas de javu sama pantai Ancol. Tapi Kuta, lebih tertata dan rapih serta viewnya juga oke.

Jalan menuju pantainya sangat padat dan ramai. MACET. Saya datang di weekday padahal, begitu weekend lebih boom lagi padetnya. Parkir motor tersedia, gak begitu besar, jadi kalau mau parkir atau keluar agak sedikit chaos.

name: Zachira Emmanuelle Quinza
text:
Review Pantai Kuta Bali
Pantai Kuta Bali merupakan salah satu pantai paling terkenal di Indonesia dan dunia. Pantai ini terkenal dengan pasir putihnya yang halus, ombaknya yang cocok untuk berselancar, dan pemandangan matahari terbenam yang indah. Pantai Kuta juga merupakan pusat keramaian dan hiburan di Bali, dengan berbagai restoran, kafe, bar, dan toko yang berjejer di sepanjang pantainya.
Berikut beberapa kelebihan dan kekurangan Pantai Kuta Bali:
Kelebihan:
* Pasir putih yang halus: Pasir putih di Pantai Kuta sangat halus dan bersih, sehingga nyaman untuk berjemur dan berjalan kaki di sepanjang pantai.
* Ombak yang cocok untuk berselancar: Pantai Kuta memiliki ombak yang cukup besar dan konsisten, sehingga cocok untuk berselancar bagi pemula maupun peselancar berpengalaman.
* Pemandangan matahari terbenam yang indah: Pantai Kuta terkenal dengan pemandangan matahari terbenamnya yang indah.
* Pusat keramaian dan hiburan: Pantai Kuta merupakan pusat keramaian dan hiburan di Bali, dengan berbagai restoran, kafe, bar, dan toko yang berjejer di sepanjang pantainya.
* Mudah diakses: Pantai Kuta mudah diakses dari berbagai tempat di Bali. Bandara Internasional I Gusti Ngurah Rai terletak hanya 15 menit dari pantai ini.
Kekurangan:
* Ramai: Pantai Kuta selalu ramai dikunjungi wisatawan, baik domestik maupun mancanegara. Hal ini dapat membuat pantai terasa sesak dan tidak nyaman bagi beberapa orang.
* Harga yang mahal: Harga makanan, minuman, dan barang-barang di Pantai Kuta generally lebih mahal dibandingkan dengan tempat lain di Bali.
* Sampah: Di beberapa area di Pantai Kuta, masih terdapat sampah yang berserakan.
Secara keseluruhan, Pantai Kuta Bali adalah pantai yang indah dan menarik untuk dikunjungi. Pantai ini cocok untuk wisatawan yang ingin berjemur, berselancar, menikmati pemandangan matahari terbenam, dan berbelanja.
Tips:
* Jika Anda ingin menghindari keramaian, sebaiknya kunjungi Pantai Kuta di luar musim liburan.
* Bawalah uang tunai yang cukup, karena tidak semua tempat di Pantai Kuta menerima pembayaran dengan kartu.
* Gunakan tabir surya untuk melindungi kulit Anda dari sinar matahari.
* Jagalah kebersihan pantai dengan membuang sampah pada tempatnya.

name: Muhammad Rajabul Gufron
text: Pantai Kuta is a renowned beach located in the Kuta District, Badung Regency, Bali, Indonesia. This beach has been a significant tourist destination since the early 1970s, known for its long sandy shoreline and as a popular spot for surfers, attracting visitors from around the world. Kuta Beach is part of the Denpasar metropolitan area, situated approximately 12 km south of downtown Denpasar. The area surrounding Kuta Beach offers a variety of accommodations, restaurants, and bars, contributing to its status as one of Indonesia's major tourist destinations. Additionally, Kuta Beach is near Bali's Ngurah Rai Airport, making it easily accessible to travelers arriving in Bali.

name: lluis llanas
text:
KUTA BEACH

Kuta, is a resort town on the island of Bali, there is a famous beach that all tourists love.  This beach, with its 3 kilometers of cream-colored sand, is known as the liveliest in all of Bali.  It was bordered to the north by Leján and to the south by Bali's international airport, Ngurah Rai.  Its waves attract surfers from all over the world, making it their favorite place.

However, it is not all tranquility on beautiful Kuta Beach.  A one-way street, Jalam Plantar Street, divides the beach in two.  Although some call it "Pedestrian Street", the truth is that it is a narrow street with two sidewalks, one of them so small that you could barely walk on it.  This street is full of hotels and resorts for tourists, and is the constant passage of cars and motorcycles that do not let up.  Crossing it is an almost impossible task, since in Bali, as in all of Indonesia, the car always has priority.

Furthermore, life in Kuta is marked by the total gentrification of private homes.  Everything in those streets is designed for tourists, from the restaurants to the souvenir shops.  The municipal ordinance leaves a lot to be desired, and security is not as high as in other areas of Indonesia.

Regardless, the nightlife in Kuta is lively and bustling, attracting many fun-seeking visitors.

The typical old Bali style shops have been replaced by uggly far to small concrete bunkers. There is a new footpath build at the wrong location. The footpath is also dangerous for people with a vision problem, steep edges with sometimes 30 cm drops and on the South side you fall on rocks and get likely hurt badly. Typical Indonesian lack of safety

name: PRITHVIJIT DEBNATH (TravellingdoctorPrithvi)
text: Kuta beach is one of the most popular beaches in Bali, near the denpasar, area near the airport. Lots of activities go on all the time. From the early morning sunrise the surfing coaching and surfing activities start. Then the small shacks selling coconuts and drinks , chairs are set on the beach, massages, hair designers come. Sometime the kites are also seen to fly. On one side , the airport runway is seen jutting out to the sea. The planes descend on them like almost on the sea itself. What a sight! A very beautiful place at the sunset. Not very costly and many ranges of prices are seen for everything. Restaurants line up the beach side road with resorts and hotels. Nice place.

name: M Farkhan Mubarok
text: The coast of kuta is a tourist attraction situated in the southern denpasar city of denpasar, Bali, Indonesia. The area isa global tourist destination and has been the mainstay of Bali since the early 1970's. The coast of kuta is often referred to as the sunset coast as the opposite of the sanur coast. Furthermore, I gusti ngurah rai airstrip is not far from kuta. Before becoming a tourist attraction, kuta was a trading port where local products were traded to buyers from outside Bali. In the 19th century, mads Lange, a Danish merchant, came to Bali and established a trading base in kuta. He was a master of negotiation and therefore became famous among the Kings of Bali and the Netherlands. Kuta beach is famous for having good waves for surfing (surfing),[2] especially for novice surfers. Besides the beauty of the beach, kuta beach Tours also offered such forms as bars, restaurants, shops, restaurants, hotels, and grocery stores, as well as street vendors along the coast to legian beach. As a beach resort, kuta beach was equipped with parking lots along beaches, public bathrooms, beach umbrellas, food and drink shops, and board rental sites.

name: aj
text:
Kuta Beach is a popular destination nestled on the southern coast of Bali, Indonesia, renowned for its vibrant atmosphere and stunning sunset views. Stretching along the Indian Ocean, the beach attracts surfers, sun-seekers, and party enthusiasts alike.

The golden sands of Kuta Beach provide a picturesque setting for various activities. Surfers flock to catch the impressive waves, making it an ideal spot for both beginners and seasoned surfers. The beach is also dotted with colorful beach umbrellas and loungers, creating a relaxed ambiance for those looking to soak up the sun.

While the daytime scene is energetic and bustling, Kuta Beach truly comes alive at sunset. The sky transforms into a canvas of warm hues, casting a magical glow over the horizon. It's a spectacle that draws crowds every evening, creating a sense of camaraderie among visitors.

The surrounding area offers a plethora of shops, restaurants, and bars, contributing to Kuta's vibrant nightlife. However, this lively atmosphere may not be suitable for those seeking a tranquil beach experience.

Overall, Kuta Beach is a dynamic destination that caters to a diverse range of interests. Whether you're a water sports enthusiast, a sunset admirer, or someone who enjoys the nightlife, Kuta Beach has something to offer, making it a must-visit when exploring Bali's coastal treasures.

name: Dulmen Saif Siregar
text:
Pantai Kuta di Pulau Bali adalah salah satu tujuan wisata yang paling populer dan ikonik di Indonesia. Saya ingin berbagi pengalaman positif saya tentang Pantai Kuta dan mengapa saya merasa bahwa ini adalah tempat yang sangat istimewa untuk dijelajahi.

Pantai Kuta dikenal karena keindahan alamnya yang memukau. Pantai ini menawarkan pasir putih yang lembut dan luas dengan ombak yang indah. Ketika matahari terbenam di balik cakrawala, pemandangan yang mempesona ini menjadi sangat memukau. Saya selalu merasa bahwa Pantai Kuta adalah tempat yang sempurna untuk bersantai, menikmati keindahan alam, dan melepaskan penat.

Salah satu aspek yang paling saya hargai dari Pantai Kuta adalah ombaknya yang sempurna untuk berselancar. Pantai ini merupakan surga bagi para penggemar selancar, baik pemula maupun yang berpengalaman. Anda dapat menyewa papan selancar atau bergabung dengan sekolah selancar di sekitar pantai untuk merasakan kesenangan menguasai ombak. Selain itu, selancar adalah cara yang baik untuk menjelajahi keindahan Pantai Kuta dari perspektif yang berbeda.

Kuta juga menawarkan berbagai kegiatan pantai lainnya. Pantai ini adalah tempat yang sempurna untuk berenang, berjemur, atau hanya berjalan-jalan di sepanjang garis pantai yang panjang. Anda juga dapat menikmati aktivitas seperti parasailing, banana boat, atau naik kuda di sekitar pantai. Pilihan kegiatan ini menjadikan Pantai Kuta sebagai tempat yang cocok untuk semua orang, baik keluarga, pasangan, atau solo traveler.

Pantai Kuta juga memiliki berbagai warung dan restoran di sepanjang jalan Pantai Kuta yang menyajikan hidangan lokal dan internasional. Makanan lezat dengan pemandangan pantai yang menakjubkan adalah pengalaman yang harus dicoba. Saya selalu menikmati makan siang atau makan malam di salah satu tempat makan di sini sambil menikmati suara ombak yang menenangkan.

Pantai Kuta adalah tempat yang sangat bersahabat bagi wisatawan. Anda akan menemukan berbagai penginapan yang sesuai dengan anggaran Anda, mulai dari hostel hingga hotel mewah. Selain itu, area sekitar pantai memiliki berbagai toko suvenir, galeri seni, dan pasar yang menjual barang-barang unik dan kerajinan lokal. Ini adalah tempat yang tepat untuk berbelanja oleh-oleh atau mencari kenang-kenangan dari perjalanan Anda.

Keamanan dan kebersihan di Pantai Kuta juga dijaga dengan baik. Anda akan melihat petugas pantai yang menjaga keselamatan pengunjung dan menjaga pantai tetap bersih. Ini memberikan rasa aman dan nyaman saat menjelajahi dan bermain di pantai.

Pantai Kuta juga memiliki kehidupan malam yang aktif. Ada banyak bar, klub, dan tempat hiburan malam di sekitar pantai yang menawarkan hiburan dan musik langsung. Bagi mereka yang ingin merayakan malam dengan suasana yang hidup, Pantai Kuta adalah tempat yang sempurna.

Selain itu, Pantai Kuta memiliki banyak acara dan festival yang menarik sepanjang tahun, seperti pesta tahun baru, festival musik, dan kompetisi selancar. Ini menambahkan elemen hiburan tambahan yang membuat kunjungan Anda lebih berkesan.

Secara keseluruhan, Pantai Kuta adalah tujuan yang luar biasa di Pulau Bali. Keindahan alamnya, ombak yang sempurna untuk berselancar, berbagai kegiatan pantai, pilihan makanan yang lezat, dan suasana yang hidup menjadikan pantai ini sebagai tempat yang sempurna untuk liburan. Saya selalu merasa bahwa kunjungan saya ke Pantai Kuta adalah pengalaman yang penuh kenangan dan saya akan selalu kembali ke sini untuk menikmati pesona dan keramahan yang ditawarkan oleh pantai ini.

text:
Единственные 2 плюса этого пляжа -серфинг,закат.
Если сравнивать это пляж с другими ,то это самый худший .
Первое,что бросается в глаза ,то это очень мало лежаков и стоят они просто космос (по сравнению с другими пляжами ,где за день 2 лежака стоит 100000 рупий ,то здесь оплата почасовая и если брать на целый день 2 лежака, то стоимость больше 250000.)Там в основном, как показано на фото, пластмассовые сидения под зонтиком ,но люди же на пляж не сидеть приходят .
Снова же в сравнении с другими пляжами здесь прям на пляже нет заведений ,чтобы покушать .Только местные напитки и перекус у местных людей или же переходить дорогу и по улице ходить искать заведения (цены через дорогу ,снова же в сравнении с другими пляжами завышены ).

name: Sourabh
text: Kuta Beach in Bali is a popular spot known for its vast sandy shores and stunning sunsets. As the day draws to a close, the sky puts on a breathtaking display of colors.While the beach is a great experience, it's worth noting that the coconut drinks are a bit on the pricey side, even at 40,000 Indonesian Rupiah (IDR). This might be a consideration for budget-conscious travelers.Despite this, Kuta Beach remains a must-visit. The sunsets and the overall vibe are truly special. Keep in mind that due to its popularity, the beach can get quite crowded, which might not be ideal for a quiet swim. The waves here tend to be quite strong.All in all, Kuta Beach offers a memorable Bali experience. If you're looking for stunning sunsets and don't mind spending a bit extra on refreshments, it's definitely worth a visit. Just be prepared for a bustling atmosphere!

name: Driver Gojek Bali
text:
Jalan yang sering sekali di lalu entah kerja atau santai. Sayangnya Sering macet karna mobil parkir sembarangan. Padahal sudah jelas tanda larangan parkir tapi kenapa masih di biarkan mobil di pinggir jalan parkir. Semakin lebar jalan bukan semakin nyaman Tapi Semakin sempit. Padahal sudah di buat lagi parkir untuk mobil dan motor yang luas tapi tetep di pinggir jalan. Pertanyaan saya satu Kenapa tidak ada Ketegasan agar tidak mengganggu lalu lintas di jalan. Tapi Kalau saya bintang 5 saya suka dengan Suasana Malam Hari Indah😍
Mohon di tindak tegas Mobil yang perkir di pinggir jalan demi kenyamanan pengguna Jalan Umum😉Terimakasih

Please note for some souvenir seller on this beach. Sometimes, they sell the goods with costs more expensive then usual, however, you can refuse it nicely if you don't want buy their merchandhise.

Also, please note that all toilets on this beach have maintenance fee that costs Rp. 5.000

name: Sophie
text:
Being from Australia myself, I am yet to understand why Australians come here. I thought Seminyak was bad until I realised this morning that Kuta is even worse. Dirty, dirty, dirty. Full of plastic, trash, cigarettes, and even dog poo. It is also only for surfers. The beach is closed to swimmers as waves are too  big. You have to pay AUD10 for a chair with a trash view.

You get harassed by taxis or sellers every minute. I understand there might be desperation to make money, but it ain't the way. I thought it might be cheap booze attracting tourists, but paying AUD9.50 for a small glass of low quality wine ain't my definition of cheap.

I wouldn't come back and wouldn't recommend it. I came here as part of a bigger trip from Thailand. Night and day...

name: Dionisia GV
text:
Seit ich Kind war und bis jetzt besuche ich Kuta Strand jedes Jahr. Der Zustand hat sich leider verschlechtert und verschlimmert.
Der Strand war / ist schön für Surfer Anfänger und Wellen spielen, aber nicht zum Ausruhen. Je nach Jahreszeiten hat der Strand mehr Müll, vor allem in der Regenszeit.
Der Strand hat:
1. Müll Problem
Der Müll ist schlimm! Überall am Strand, vor dem Strand 🤮, vor dem Eingang von Straße.
Nur wenn man mit den Wellen bis in die Mitte spielt, spurt man den Dreck nicht. Ich habe immer meine Strandschuhe an gehabt (für Sicherheit). Da wir immer weit mit den Wellen spielen, ist es noch okay. Aber sobald wir den Strand Richtung Straße verlassen, muss ich mein Atmung angehalten und Gänze Haut haben. Die Müllberge sind fast überall 🤮.
Ich verstehe die Regierung nicht. Das Problem haben sie nicht von gestern. Warum gibt es gar keine Lösung und Verbesserungsmaßnahmen dafür?
Zum Beispiel, jedes Jahr habe ich meine Heimatstadt Surabaya besucht, jedes Jahr sehe ich Verbesserungen, sauberer, mehr Grüne, bessere Infrastruktur, usw.
Kuta ist dagegen.

2. Verkäufer Problem
Die nerven die Besucher total. Warum kann die Regierung darüber nicht nachdenken und eine Lösung finden?
Toilette nutzen wir nicht, Getränke kaufen wir nicht und unschöne Stühle mieten wir nicht. Wir übernachten in einem Resort in der Nähe und nach Wellenspiel laufen wir direkt hin.
Gibt es in Kuta vielleicht Bände oder Mafia?

3. Menschen Problem
Die Menschen selber sind die Probleme. Wie sie sich verhalten, wie sie ihren Müll nicht selber weggenommen haben.

4. Abrasion Problem
Kuta hat sehr viel Sand verloren. Letztes Mal war ich vor Corona hier und der Strand hat noch Sand. Jetzt hat der circa 3 Meter vll. Sand verloren? Man sieht sehr viele kleine Korallen und Steine. Damals gab es am meistens Sand.
Deswegen gibt es überall große Steine und Sandsäcke am oberen Strand.

Die ganzen Probleme macht mich traurig, wütend und enttäuscht.
Was gut in Kuta ist, dass man leckeres Essen schnell finden kann, shoppen kann, in der Nähe von Waterbom, usw.

Die Insel ist kaputter geworden. Immer mehr Beach Clubs überall gebaut, immer mehr Gebäude für die Nomaden Worker , z.B in Canggu gebaut, Cafés und Tourist Attraktionen gebaut. Alles für Geld. Aber bis wann .... ????

Die Natur ist auf dieser Insel immer mehr zerstört. Traurig und schrecklich!

Wir übernachten dieses Jahr 3 Wochen auf Bali.

Aber wahrscheinlich ist dieses Jahr mein letztes Besuch in Kuta oder sogar Bali. Ich hatte ja schon viele Orte auf Bali besucht.
Es lohnt sich nicht mehr, hierher zu kommen.

Bali ist nicht schuld, aber die Menschen schon!

Tschüss, Bali 🌊😥

name: Muchlis Akbar
text:
Gue baru aja nyobain ke Kuta Beach di Bali, guys, dan seru banget deh! Pantainya tuh bikin gue langsung betah. Pasirnya lembut dan gak panas di kaki, jadi enak buat jalan-jalan di tepi pantai. Udah gitu, ombaknya juga gede dan cocok buat main-main sama gelombangnya.

Tempatnya tuh rame banget, banyak turis dari berbagai negara yang lagi nikmatin pantai juga. Gue sempet liat beberapa peselancar yang lagi asyik maen ombak di sini. Kayaknya emang Kuta Beach ini spot favorit buat peselancar deh, soalnya ombaknya keren banget.

Gak cuman pantainya aja yang asik, tapi di sekitarnya juga banyak warung-warung makan dan toko-toko suvenir. Jadi kalo lo abis capek main di pantai, tinggal nyari tempat buat makan atau belanja oleh-oleh.

Pemandangan matahari terbenam di Kuta Beach juga gak boleh dilewatkan. Gue liat sendiri, langitnya berubah jadi warna-warni yang cantik banget pas matahari mau tenggelam. Bener-bener momen yang bikin hati adem.

Secara keseluruhan, Kuta Beach itu recommended banget buat yang pengen ngerasain liburan pantai yang seru. Pantainya keren, suasana asik, dan banyak hal yang bisa lo lakuin di sini. Gak heran kalo tempat ini terkenal di seluruh Bali. Jadi, kalo lo lagi di sekitar sini, mampir ke Kuta Beach itu pilihan yang oke banget!

name: Chevi Mas
text: Puede que no sea la mejor playa de la isla en términos de belleza natural, pero la playa de Kuta es mundialmente famosa y con razón. Se trata de uno de los lugares más animados de Bali, que ofrece varias actividades: el surf, los restaurantes, las compras y las fiestas nocturnas. Esta zona está siempre abarrotada, y junto con las vecinas playas de Legian y Seminyak, es uno de los lugares con más ambiente de Bali. Se pueden reservar clases de surf y alquilar tablas, tumbonas y sombrillas directamente a los vendedores instalados en la arena. También encontrarás muchos cafés y restaurantes que bordean la playa. Es fácil disuadir a los vendedores ambulantes, pero un zumo de coco frío servido directamente en la tumbona es una auténtica bendición en un día caluroso.

name: Jolanda Z-B (Zandwoman)
text: Heerlijke plek voor surfers en goede zwemmers vanwege hoge golven. Vanaf deze kant is het mooi de zon onder te zien gaan. Veel zonnebedden, parasols en zitzakken op het strand. Veel verkopers over het strand die je continu aanspreken, maar ja ook zij moeten monden voeden. Er zijn veel souvenir winkeltjes, restaurants en hotels in de vele gezellige een drukbezochte straatjes achter de boulevard gelegen. Wij waren hier in 2009, 2019 en 2023. De laatste keer viel het ons op dat er bizar weinig toeristen scooters/motoren hadden gehuurd, in de media lazen we dat dit niet meer kon of mocht van de regering. Maar wij hebben dit zonder moeite kunnen huren (we hebben geen motorrijbewijs en er werd sowieso niet naar een rijbewijs gevraagd en legitimatie) en zijn vanaf Kuta op eigen houtje gereden met 2 scooters naar Sanur, Ubud en Uluwatu vanuit Kuta.

text:
Sangat bagus untuk sunset, tapi sayangnya pantainya kurang halus pada bagian pasirnya, tapi bagusnya karena sunsetnya sangat bagus kelihatan, banyak jajanan, tukang pijat, tempatnya strategis,

Pantai Kuta adalah salah satu destinasi wisata paling ikonik di Indonesia, terletak di pulau Bali. Pantai ini menawarkan kombinasi sempurna antara keindahan alam tropis dan keseruan aktivitas pantai yang tak tertandingi.

Dengan pasir putih yang lembut di bawah kaki Anda dan ombak yang menggoda bagi para peselancar, Pantai Kuta menarik pengunjung dari berbagai penjuru dunia. Setiap tahun, ribuan wisatawan datang ke pantai ini untuk menikmati suasana yang menyegarkan dan melupakan sejenak kesibukan kota.

Salah satu daya tarik utama Pantai Kuta adalah pemandangan matahari terbenam yang menakjubkan. Menyaksikan matahari perlahan tenggelam di ufuk barat sambil duduk di bibir pantai adalah pengalaman yang tak terlupakan dan pasti akan meninggalkan kenangan manis.

Namun, sebagai destinasi populer, Pantai Kuta sering kali ramai dan penuh dengan aktivitas. Bagi mereka yang mencari ketenangan, disarankan untuk mengunjungi pantai ini di luar jam sibuk atau di musim yang kurang padat.

Pantai Kuta juga menawarkan berbagai fasilitas seperti restoran, bar, toko suvenir, dan penyewaan peralatan selancar. Anda dapat mencoba berbagai makanan lezat dan membeli cinderamata khas Bali sebagai kenang-kenangan.

Secara keseluruhan, Pantai Kuta adalah tempat yang menyenangkan untuk dijelajahi dan dinikmati bersama teman dan keluarga. Dengan panorama yang menakjubkan dan suasana yang hangat, pantai ini tak diragukan lagi merupakan surga bagi para pencinta pantai dan petualang.

name: Manon Soukup
text:
Perfekt für Sonnenuntergänge, sauber, feiner Sandstrand!

Haben unsere ersten Tage in Bali hier in Kuta verbracht und waren fast jeden Tag am Strand. Sauber, feiner Sand - allerdings oft starker Wellengang, unbedingt an den Fahnen orientieren wo man schwimmen darf und wo nicht.
Bademeister sind auch laufend vor Ort, sie passen auch auf und helfen, falls jemand sich nicht auskennen sollte.

Haben unsere Liegen bei Dony gemietet für 100k pro Tag (Orangene Holzliegen, Grüne Matten, Blaue Schirme). Top Service - er hat auf unsere Sachen aufgepasst wenn wir im Wasser waren und hat uns sogar mit top Essen & Trinken versorgt ohne dass wir aufstehen mussten.
Wir haben mit Doni dann auch eine Surfstunde für Anfänger gebucht - kann ich sehr empfehlen!

name: Dicky Harmawan
text:
Pantai Kuta is a must-visit destination in Bali, Indonesia. It's a beautiful beach that attracts both foreign tourists and locals alike. The beach is always bustling with many tourists enjoying the sun, sea, and sand. You can find various food and drink stands along the beach, making it convenient for visitors to grab a bite or refreshment.

One of the advantages of Pantai Kuta is its proximity to the city, making it easily accessible. However, it's important to remember that the area can get quite crowded, especially during peak times. To avoid traffic jams, it's recommended to use a taxi or simply walk to the beach.

Overall, Pantai Kuta offers a lively and vibrant atmosphere, perfect for those seeking a mix of beach relaxation and entertainment. Don't miss the chance to experience the vibrant energy and beauty of Kuta Beach while you're in Bali.

text:
Salah satu Icon paling populer dan terkenal di Bali. Meski sudah sering kesini tapi baru sekarang mereview tempatnya.

Okey bibir pantainya ini cukup panjang sejauh 5km. Area bagian tengah cukup padat turis dan pedagang jadi kalau kalian mau cari yang agak sepi bisa ke bagian ujung utara dan selatan.

Pantainya sendiri cukup bersih [ kotor hanya di musim2 tertentu saat air laut membawa sampah ]. Banyak pedagang yang menawarkan jasa seperti makanan, minuman, selancar, hyena, pijat dan lainnya dan semua bisa coba kalian tawar ya. Pantainya saat ini juga sudah punya jalan setapak yang membuat pejalan kaki lebih nyaman menikmati pantai. Tempatnya juga asik buat berselancar, berenang maupun menikmati matahari terbenam.

Tapi sepertinya saat terakhir kesini kemarin garis pantainya jadi lebih dekat ya ? Apa karena sedang pasang saja air lautnya ?

name: Muhamad Aldi Ramadhan
text:
Salah satu pantai di Pulau Bali yang paling dikenal banyak orang. Kalau ingin melihat pantai yang ombaknya tenang, silahkan ke sini. Menurut saya pribadi, pantai ini tidak memiliki daya tarik lebih kalau kita datang hanya untuk duduk (dengan biaya yg beragam, dari Rp.50.000 sampai Rp.100.000 per jamnya) dan foto-foto dengan background pantai. Pantai Kuta lebih bisa dinikmati kalau anda bisa maupun ingin belajar berselancar. Selain foto-foto dan berselancar, di wilayah Kuta sangat mudah untuk menemui para bule, cocok untuk teman-teman yang mungkin ingin mencoba bercengkerama dan melatih kemampuan bahasa asingnya.

Kemarin saat saya ke sana, mobil tidak bisa diparkir di sisi-sisi jalanan. Mobil saya dan keluarga parkir di mall basement Beachwalk, agar sekalian bisa jalan-jalan dan belanja di sana.

name: ErmaDN
text:
Mari sejenak lupakan rutinitas. Ada kursi-kursi malas dan tikar untuk berbaring di hamparan pasir putih. Ombak juga mulai tenang. Di kejauhan, semburat jingga menghiasi ujung langit hingga akhirnya ditelan lautan lepas. Pantai dan senja yang merona menjadi suguhan yang sayang dilewatkan jika Anda berkunjung ke Pantai Kuta, Bali.

Siapa tak kenal Pantai Kuta? Bali sebagai “surga terakhir di bumi” takkan lengkap tanpa Pantai Kuta. Bersama Sanur, Kuta adalah salah satu pantai paling ikonik di Bali.

Kuta sudah menjadi salah satu destinasi wajib wisatawan yang berkunjung ke Bali. Pada awal abad ke-20, pemerintah kolonial mulai mengembangkan Bali sebagai objek wisata. Brosur-brosur wisata mempromosikan Bali sebagai tujuan wisata. Pada 1923 kapal penumpang Belanda mulai melayani Singaraja, dan pada 1928 wisma pemerintah di Denpasar ditingkatkan dan dibuka kembali sebagai Hotel Bali.

Namun Kuta masih belum mendapat banyak perhatian sampai kedatangan perempuan Inggris-Amerika bernama Vannine Walker alias K’tut Tantri, yang kelak turut dalam Revolusi Indonesia. Dia menceritakan kenangannya tentang Kuta pada 1930-an dalam bukunya Revolusi di Nusa Damai. “Pantai di situ indah sekali, tanpa ada sebuah rumah pun. Bahkan gubuk saja tidak ada! Yang ada hanya beberapa pura, serta perahu nelayan yang banyak sekali jumlahnya. Kalau aku membangun rumah di situ, alangkah nyamannya!” tulis K’tut Tantri.

Pada 1936, pasangan seniman dari Amerika Serikat Louise Garret dan Robert Koke diantar K’tut Tantri berkeliling naik sepeda dan menyadari betapa indah Pantai Kuta. Mereka lalu membangun beberapa bungalow untuk wisatawan yang mulai bosan dengan Denpasar. Kisah ini adalah awal mula dari Kuta Beach Hotel, hotel pertama di Pantai Kuta.Namun, Ktut Tantri kemudian keluar dari bisnis hotel bersama ini dan membangun hotel sendiri bernama Suara Segara. Dua hotel awal di Pantai Kuta ini bersaing hingga meletus Perang Dunia II dan keduanya turut hancur selama perang. Menurut K’tut Tantri, Jepang sempat menggunakan lapangan udara di dekat Kuta sebagai pangkalan operasi pengeboman.
Hingga 1960-an, Pantai Kuta masih terbilang sepi oleh wisatawan. Sampai kemudian pantai ini menjadi tujuan para backpacker yang menganggap Sanur dan Denpasar terlalu mahal. Sejak itu, Pantai Kuta dengan matahari terbenamnya mulai naik daun. Penduduk setempat mulai menyewakan kamar dan membuka warung dengan makanan yang sesuai dengan selera wisatawan.

Pemerintah setempat mulai menata Kuta. Mandi telanjang dilarang. Beberapa orang bahkan ditangkap. Pembangunan Kuta juga digiatkan.
Kuta telah menjadi salah satu simbol pariwisata Bali, bahkan Indonesia. Tak heran jika fasilitas penunjang hiburan bagi para wisatawan tak sulit ditemukan di sepanjang pantai ini. Dari homestay, losmen, hotel mewah hingga resort. Dari restoran, gerai makanan cepat saji, bar, hingga tempat hiburan. Jalur yang sejajar dengan pantai juga dipenuhi toko cinderamata dan beragam atraksi wisata yang membuat Pantai Kuta semakin hiruk pikuk.

Pantai Kuta terletak di Kecamatan Kuta, Kabupaten Badung. Pantai ini selalu ramai dikunjungi wisatawan. Selain indah, letaknya pun strategis karena terletak tidak jauh dari Bandar Udara Internasional Ngurah Rai. Dari bandara, perjalanan hanya memakan waktu sekitar 15 menit menuju pantai.

Duduk di atas pasir lembut Pantai Kuta, dari kejauhan, dapat terlihat para peselancar yang berpacu menaklukkan ombak. Pantai Kuta memang terkenal memiliki ombak yang bagus tetapi cukup aman. Tidak mengherankan jika pantai ini menjadi salah satu tempat yang direkomendasikan bagi para peselancar pemula.

Di sekitar pantai terdapat tempat-tempat yang menyediakan jasa penyewaan perlengkapan berselancar – lengkap dengan instruktur lokal uang siap memandu wisatawan yang ingin belajar berselancar.
Selain ombaknya yang menantang, Kuta dikenal dengan pemandangan matahari terbenam yang sungguh menawan. Karena itulah, selepas lelah berselancar, para pengunjung dapat melepas lelah sambil menikmati panorama indah ini.

name: Alen
text:
Kuta Beach is a top-rated destination in Bali that you simply can't miss! Here's what you need to know:
Things to Do: Kuta Beach is the perfect spot for surfing, swimming, sunbathing, and people-watching. The waves are great for beginners, so if you've ever wanted to try surfing, now's your chance! Not only that! U can also walk along the shore while enjoying the beautiful sunset of Kuta Beach. If you don’t want to get tired, u can just simply sitting on the beautiful sand while drinking a whole coconut.
What to See: The beach itself is the main attraction, but if you want to take a break from the sand, you can check out the nearby Kuta Beachwalk mall for some shopping or grab a bite at the Hard Rock Cafe. You can also pay your respects at the Bali Bombing Memorial, a somber reminder of the tragic events that happened in Bali back in 2002.
Things to Eat: Food options around Kuta Beach are endless! You can find everything from local warungs (small restaurants) serving up tasty Nasi Goreng and Satay to fancy international cuisine restaurants. Don't forget to try some refreshing tropical drinks while you're there!
Operational Hours and Entrance Fee: Kuta Beach is open 24/7, and there's no entrance fee. So, you can enjoy the beach anytime you want, day or night.
Things to Buy: When you're done soaking up the sun, take a stroll down the street and hit up some of the souvenir shops. You can find unique handicrafts, kamen, beachwear, and other trinkets that make perfect souvenirs.
Location and Accessibility: Kuta Beach is in the heart of Bali's tourist district, only a 10-minute drive from the airport. You can easily get there by taxi, motorbike, or public transportation.
Facilities: Kuta Beach is well-equipped with public restrooms, showers, changing rooms, and lifeguards. You can also rent beach chairs and umbrellas, get a massage, or buy some refreshments from the vendors on the beach.
Overall, Kuta Beach is a fun and vibrant place to be, with plenty to see and do. However, be warned that it can get crowded, especially during peak season. So, make sure to come early to secure your spot on the sand and beat the crowds!

name: Diah Putri
text: I visited Kuta Beach with my friends and we had a great time. The beach was clean and spacious, and the water was warm and clear. We enjoyed swimming, surfing and sunbathing. There were also plenty of restaurants, bars and shops nearby to keep us entertained. One of the highlights of our trip was watching the sunset at Kuta Beach. It was a spectacular sight, with the sky changing colors. The only downside was that it was very crowded and noisy, especially at night. Some of the vendors were also very annoying. Overall, I would recommend Kuta Beach to anyone who likes a lively and fun beach vacation.

name: yuni naomita
text:
2023.04.26
Pertama sekali mengunjungi pantai Kuta saat anakku baru berusia 1 stengah tahun tahun 2014 dan langsung jatuh cinta pada Kuta Beach ini 💙💙💙💙💙
Pantainya luas banget,pasirnya lembut dan putih dan juga deburan ombaknya mampu membuatku berseru² akan kebesaran Tuhan atas alam semesta ini 😇
Dan Tahun 2023 ini berkesempatan lagi bawa anak berkunjung dan menikmati Pantai Kuta ini saat usianya sudah 9tahun 💘
Anak saya sangat senang bermain lagi di pantai ini,
Sepuasnya dia membangun istana pasir versi dia 🐳
Matahari terbenam kita dapat saksikan dengan indah dari pantai kuta ini 💎
Sayangnya saat pagi hari ada hujan turun sehingga membuat matahari terbit tidak dapat kita nikmati 🤧
Tapi itu tidak mengurangi semangat kami untuk datang pagi hari ke pantai 💙💙
Liburan sekolah anak di bulan April ini sangat seru ya 💜💜💜
Saat akan liburan di Bali dan yang mau ke Pantai Kuta usahakanlah menginap dekat dengan pantainya agar jalan cepat dan tidak terjebak macet 👍👍
Dari hotel kami menginap hanya jalan 5menit menuju pantai kuta ✍💌
Selamat berkunjung ya ❤
Salam sehat 🤎

What a beautiful beach great small waves to learn how to surf 👍ask for a local called Abdul to teach you,only $25 for 2 hours.
The hawkers or sales ladies on the beach are an absolute nightmare, they continually bombard you with pressure sales and virtually sit next to you within 6 inches of you in groups up to 5 for hours and will not let you enjoy yourself because it's all about their sales....

name: Gameplay Programmer
text:
Extremely dirty place with dark muddy water, rubbish in the water and on the sand.  Filled with clingy people who are agressively trying to sell you their service and keep attacking foreignes every 20 seconds. You can't relax in peace, horde of local sellers will keep bothering you until you run away to your hotel, and even on the way back they will keep soliciting their services to you every 20 seconds. This is not an exaggeration - I measured it, roughly every 20 seconds you get asked to buy something and they don't respect a "no". I basically had to run in order to avoid them, generally this place is a cheap resort for drunk bogans and russians escaping from drafting. I do not recommend this beach, this town or this island in general. Dirt, rubbish and scammers everywhere.
Generally, beaches of Bali are all dirty compared to perfectly clean beaches of Australia. In Australia water is transparent, sand is white and everything is very clean and nice. The only reason why people who have perfect beaches in Australia come to Bali that has dirty beaches - is cheap prices for everything.

banyak hal yg perlu dibenahi dipantai ini diantaranya :
- Pungli preman sangat marak. Fasilitas untuk bilas badan yang udah jelas itu dri pemerintah dimintain uang. dan tampilan yang mintain itu tidak seperti orang lokal sana.
- Fasilitas banyak yg rusak. Selain fasilitas umum dimintain uang seperti yg saya sebutin diatas. banyak jg kran air untuk bilas yang rusak. jadi apa gunanya?
- Banyak pedagang yang menghampiri wisatawan dan memaksa  seakan² kita harus beli atau kalau tidak bakal dibuntutin sampe ke ujung ( Harus ditolak tegas )

namun Jika hanya untuk menikmati sunset dan duduk bersantai dipinggir pantai. kuta masi sangat cocok untuk hal tersebut

name: Azis abdul Rohman
text:
Pantai Kuta adalah sebuah tempat pariwisata yang terletak di kecamatan Kuta sebelah selatan Kota Denpasar, Bali, Indonesia. Daerah ini merupakan sebuah tujuan wisata turis mancanegara dan telah menjadi objek wisata andalan Pulau Bali sejak awal tahun 1970-an. Pantai Kuta sering pula disebut sebagai pantai matahari terbenam sebagai lawan dari pantai Sanur. Selain itu, Lapangan Udara I Gusti Ngurah Rai terletak tidak jauh dari Kuta.
Pantai Kuta Bali merupakan salah satu tujuan wisata terkenal di Bali karena segudang keistimewaan dan daya tariknya. Salah satu alasan mengapa tempat wisata ini banyak dikunjungi wisatawan adalah akses dan transportasinya yang mudah dengan lokasi yang strategis. Simak artikel satu ini untuk mengetahui lokasi, harga tiket masuk, dan berbagai daya tarik yang dimilikinya!

name: BackpackingAndy
text:
One of the worst beaches I’ve ever been to. Not because the beach or the water but the vibe. It is soooo touristy, not Balinese at all. It is completely overrun with and geared towards anglophones from UK/Australia/etc.

Every 5 feet someone will ask you if you want to buy something. I was standing outside of a convenience store drinking water on a hot day and some guy asked me if I was looking to get a tatoo because there was one right in front of me. I was like - do I look like I want a tatoo? If I did - I think I could find it myself.

If you have any desire to experience Balinese culture at all - avoid this neighborhood. I disliked it from the moment we arrived to check it out.

text:
Pertama kali ke pantai kuta akhir Desember 1990 menjelang tahun baru. Naik bemo dari Ubung hingga pintu gerbang masuk pantai. Hiruk pikuk pengunjung memadati jalan raya menuju lokasi. Hingar bingar musik dari kafe di sepanjang jalan pantai Kuta adalah pemandangan sehari-hari bahkan hingga kini.
Pemandangan yang selalu diburu pengunjung adalah sunset di sore hari. Kalau anda beruntung, anda akan bisa menyaksikan lukisan alam yang luar biasa, yaitu 'Mata Dewa' ketika cuaca cerah tidak mendung.
Sekitar 5-6 kali ke sini berburu sunset, walau tidak selalu dapat.

name: Siap Checkout
text: Salah satu destinasi wisata yang sering dikunjungi oleh sebagian besar orang saat ke Bali yaitu pantai kuta (kuta beach). Pantai ini menjadi ikonik Bali karena view dan fasilitasnya yang lengkap. Di pantai ini kita bisa melihat pemandangan sunset yang cantik dan ditambah hilir mudik pesawat landing dan take off dari bandara ngurah rai. Di kejauhan juga akan tampak patung Garuda Wisnu Kencana (GWK). Pantai ini selalu ramai wisatawan baik di hari biasa maupun hari libur.

name: gavo jago
text:
KUTA beach was the epicenter of  backpacking in Bali decades ago. Now its palms are disappearing to make way for malls, big resorts and mini marts.
They are currently revitalizing the beachfront with a new paved walking/cycling path in the shade of the remaining trees.  A new beachfront skateboard park is just about to open along with new washroom facilities along the path and kiosks for vendors. The  new pathway will connect existing paths in Tuban (discovery mall) and Legians beach walks.
If you come during rainy season (dec-march) be prepared for a disgusting site of plenty of plastic garbage on beach despite the daily tractor raking which can barely keep up when storms wash it to shore.

name: Archie Rose
text:
Visited in January 2023.

Aware that the wet season is not Kuta at its best - but good lord it was bad.

Sand was all gone and replaced with mountains of rubbish.

It was a full blown environmental disaster.

Didn't go in the water, and I don't suggest you do either. Large bodies of brown water floating ut there in spots which Im confident is somewhere near raw sewage.

Horrible and distressing, not just environmentally, but I am aware that so many locals rely on the environment in some way for their living.

Indo government needs to step up and protect the Golden Goose here, if for no other reason than without the tourists the money dries up...............

Horrible

name: Noegroho Dewo
text:
Pagi ini seperti beberapa waktu lalu, coba joging di pantai kuta. Banyak orang yang melakukan hal serupa, didominasi wisman yang memang menginap disekitar kuta.

Parkir di depan HardRock, lalu berlari sekitar 3km sampai double six dan kembali lagi ke titik awal depan HardRock.

Kalian bisa berlari di trotoar disamping jalan raya dengan pemandangan mall, cafe, resto dan toko toko, atau berlari di pantai dengan tentu saja pemandangan pantai...  dan PKL 😁

Tenang saja, disebagian area pantai sudah dibangun pedestrian sehingga sepatu kamu gak akan kotor.

SAMPAH... nampaknya kuta masih harus bekerja keras untuk masalah yang satu ini. Semoga kedepannya semakin bersih.

Overall ini olah raga yg seru...
Berkeringat sambil berwisata ...

Seru juga melihat maraknya pembangunan disana, ada skate park, toilet umum, lapak lapak untuk PKL, sampai apa ya... ini nampaknya semacam shalter kereta wisata. Ntahlah, kita lihat saja nanti setelah jadi.

name: Slamit Tintou
text: Kuta Beach in Bali is a beautiful and popular spot for tourists. The beach has a wide stretch of white sand and clear blue water, making it ideal for swimming and sunbathing. There are also many beachside restaurants and bars, offering a variety of food and drinks. The beach is also quite lively with vendors, surfers and sunset parties. However, it can get quite crowded, especially during peak season. It's also worth noting that the beach is not as well maintained as some other beaches in Bali and the water can be quite dirty. Overall, Kuta Beach is a great spot for those looking for a lively and vibrant beach experience, but if you are looking for a more secluded and cleaner beach, there are better options available. I would rate it 4 out of 5 stars.

name: Annisa Kanon
text:
Pantai yang sangat populer di Bali, yang sayangnya sangat kotor!
Entah sampah yang terbawa arus dari tempat lain atau dari pengunjung yang tidak bertanggung jawab.
Masuknya gratis, pemandangan sunsetnya juga indah. Banyak penjual yang menawarkan minuman, tatoo (non permanen).
Bisa jadi sangat ramai saat musim liburan (Juni dan desember).
Jadi lokasi favorit untuk para turis untuk surving karena ombaknya bagus.
Pemandangan malam dari pantai sangat indah, lampu kota berkelap indah dan pemandangan pesawat yang datang dan pergi.

Semoga dilain hari pantai ini jadi lebih bersih dan terawat ❤️

Trash everywhere.... In huge piles across the beach, lined along the shores as far as the eye can see, and in large floating patches. If you need an eye opening experiencing about pollution maybe go to this beach.

The waves might be decent for beginner surfing but couldn't get over all the plastic and trash in the water. Do not recommend and would avoid.

name: 030_Valentyno Damya
text: Kuta Beach is a favorite tourist destination because it is the heart of tourism on the island of Bali. The location is very strategic and just right for enjoying the sunset, plus the well-maintained beach also adds to the beauty. Kuta Beach has a wide coastline reaching 5 kilometers plus the waves are gently sloping against the shoreline making the beach feel relaxed. Swimming activities and playing safely, no need to worry about big waves. Kuta Beach is different from most tourist attractions in Bali which apply entry fees for visitors who come. At Kuta Beach you will not be charged entrance fees or free, both for local and international tourists. Meanwhile, vehicle parking fees are charged Rp. 2,000 for motorbikes and Rp. 5,000 for cars.

name: Maula Affandy
text:
Pantai Kuta terletak di Kecamatan Kuta, Kabupaten Badung. Pantai ini selalu ramai dikunjungi wisatawan. Selain indah, letaknya pun strategis karena terletak tidak jauh dari Bandar Udara Internasional Ngurah Rai. Dari bandara, perjalanan hanya memakan waktu sekitar 15 menit menuju pantai.

Duduk di atas pasir lembut Pantai Kuta, dari kejauhan, dapat terlihat para peselancar yang berpacu menaklukkan ombak. Pantai Kuta memang terkenal memiliki ombak yang bagus tetapi cukup aman. Tidak mengherankan jika pantai ini menjadi salah satu tempat yang direkomendasikan bagi para peselancar pemula.

Di sekitar pantai terdapat tempat-tempat yang menyediakan jasa penyewaan perlengkapan berselancar – lengkap dengan instruktur lokal uang siap memandu wisatawan yang ingin belajar berselancar.
Selain ombaknya yang menantang, Kuta dikenal dengan pemandangan matahari terbenam yang sungguh menawan. Karena itulah, selepas lelah berselancar, para pengunjung dapat melepas lelah sambil menikmati panorama indah ini. Banyak yang menganggap belum lengkap kunjungan ke Pantai Kuta jika belum melihat pemandangan matahari terbenam di pantai ini.*

name: Evans Yudi Nugraha
text:
A long strip of sandy beach with calming splash of wave.
Well known spot for relaxing while watching sunset and sipping young-coconut.
There are a lot of local vendors who offer various snacks and drinks to enjoy your stay.
Dont you worry about parking space, there are plenty here. You have to extra careful though, the road is quite narrow and many pedestrians walking by.
Also there are plenty of cafes, stores, and hotels alongside Kuta Beach Road.
Alas, myself cannot enjoy sunset last time visiting here.

The only pro:
The waves are perfect condition to learn how to surf if that’s what you’re in to.

name: abhilasha sharma
text:
This is the only beach in bali which I was disappointed at.
People - i met a coconut seller who was very rude. First they dont let you sit for a minute on chair without money and next they talk bad(not all but few) so beware of such people. Although all the people in rest of areas are very good.
Night - at night there are chances of you meeting a drug seller or a thief. Do not park your vehicle(specially 2 wheeler) outside without proper parking place. But I am not scaring you, its safe to roam around. Just be cautious of people who is trying to reach you at night.
Good part - it has beautiful sunset view. Take your own mat if you want to sit and enjoy the view without paying.
Food - i suggest to better get a food outside the beach as they ask for additional money when you are inside.
There is no entry fee.

name: - Bab
text:
A l'entrée Pantai Kuta, vous allez trouver des gens qui vous harcèlent pour acheter de la drogue ou pour prendre un taxi.
Arrivé à l'intérieur, de nombreux vendeurs en tout genre viendront vous accoster, voir vous harceler tour à tour afin que vous leur achetiez des choses. Cette plage est tout sauf un lieu paradisiaque. Il n'y a pas de transats, il y a des chaises en plastiques ridicules louées à l'heure à des prix exorbitants qu'il faut constamment négocier.
Le seul point positif est le coucher de soleil.

name: Adila
text:
Pantainya lumayan bagus dan sangat ramai pada jam sunset. Yang membuat kurang nyaman adalah para penjual aksesoris maupun penyedia jasa tato/pijat yang terkesan memaksa pengunjung untuk membeli dagangan atau jasa mereka.

Jika kalian membeli pada satu penjual gelang, maka penjual lain akan menghampiri dan juga meminta untuk dagangannya dibeli. Sangat tidak nyaman apalagi harus dibuntuti kesana kemari. Baik turis lokal maupun asing mendapati perlakuan yg sama.

Sebenernya tidak ada yg salah karna mereka berusaha mencari rezeki. Tetapi alangkah baiknya untuk tidak memaksa, karna bisa menjadi nilai buruk bagi para turis yg datang ke bali.

Untuk penyewaan tempat duduk dipantai kami ditawari 50ribu/jam.
Namun ada jg yg hanya perlu membeli 1 kepala muda seharga 30rb sudah bisa duduk.
